utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items required in the format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all 5 corresponding sections. Now check if each is fully specified as required: (1) health_coverage: The format asks for physical and mental health insurance with costs. The plan provides a physical plan, a mental plan, and an overall cost, so it is fully specified. (2) property_coverage: The format asks for home/contents insurance with costs. The plan provides home_contents insurance details and a cost, so fully specified. (3) travel_coverage: The format asks for travel insurance with costs. The plan provides a plan description and a cost, so fully specified. (4) additional_services: The format asks for any enhancement services with costs. The plan includes an item (professional liability for photography) but specifies it is not available and provides no costs; this is not fully specified according to the requirement to include enhancement services with costs. (5) total_budget: The format asks for complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. The plan provides monthly and annual costs, so fully specified. Therefore, 4 out of 5 items are fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: Extract items from the final coverage plan and match them to identically named options in the ground-truth ratings. The plan includes: LifeFirst Standard Plan for physical health, InsurePlus Standard Plan for mental health, InsurePlus Standard Coverage for home contents, and LifeFirst Standard Plan for travel. For each, locate the corresponding rating number from the ground-truth sections.
